home.subtitle: Your gateway to personalized learning. Book lessons, manage your sessions, and more.
home.companyCta: Do you want to register as a company?
home.companyCtaDesc: Are you running an ESL center? Join the Brightfolks platform and manage your students, teachers, and schedules — all in one place.

learnMore.title: Why Choose Brightfolks?
learnMore.servicesDesc: Monitor your ESL center's performance and student progress all in one place.
learnMore.personalizedDesc: Easily manage your students, teachers, and class schedules without the hassle.
learnMore.flexibleDesc: Whether you're a small home-based ESL center or a growing institution, we've got you covered.
learnMore.subjectsDesc: Set up your own packages and offer as many subjects as your center needs.

features.title: Everything Your ESL Center Needs
features.subtitle: A complete system designed for students, teachers, and ESL center owners.
features.scheduleDesc: Students can schedule their classes on their own — no need to ask or constantly inquire.
features.slotsDesc: Students can browse available time slots and pick what works best for them.
features.progressDesc: Students can monitor their remaining sessions and view class reports anytime.
features.teacherDesc: Teachers can easily submit feedback after class and manage their own availability.
features.growthDesc: ESL center owners get a clear view of their growth, bookings, and overall activity.
features.accessDesc: Access your ESL center anytime, anywhere — from any device, at your own pace. Translations are also available, just click the globe icon.
